description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall finishes, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a green lawn and driveway. The front yard includes two parked cars, several trees, and a manicured lawn, while the backyard is more private with tall trees providing screening. The house has a clear open-plan interior layout, visible through the extensive glazing, and includes a garage area on one side. The landscaping is simple and geometric, complementing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and minimalist landscaping. The exterior combines dark and light finishes, with a driveway, garage, and green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entry, large windows, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade, garage entrance, and a mix of wall finishes with visible backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard, tall screening trees, and extensive glazing along the back of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid dark wall, minimal windows, and additional landscaping with trees and grass.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, large glass door, and direct access from the driveway, no porch or decorative columns.
